query:
INSERT INTO memory_context (userId, taskId, taskTitle, summary, keywords, memoryType, importance, expiresAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 810010, '[资源存档] L006 awesome-ai-system-prompts', 'CATEGORY:PROMPT_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:5600 | LANG:Markdown | CORE:Research analyzing real-world AI system prompts (Vercel v0, same.new, Manus, ChatGPT) to extract best practices for agentic AI systems. CAPABILITIES:[real_world_case_studies,8_core_design_principles,architecture_diff_analysis,actionable_best_practices] USAGE:[DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Contains Manus system prompt analysis — directly relevant to TARGET_SYSTEM architecture; use for improving agent system prompt design in analysis engine. URL:https://github.com/dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts', '系统提示词,Manus架构,AI代理设计,最佳实践,Vercel v0', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810011, '[资源存档] L007 AI Colors BairesDev', 'CATEGORY:DESIGN_SYSTEM | TYPE:SAAS | LICENSE:COMMERCIAL | CORE:AI-powered color palette generator converting text descriptions into complete color palettes. CAPABILITIES:[text_to_palette,browse_palettes,edit_export] USAGE:[WEB_APP] INTEGRATION_NOTES:No API; design-phase reference tool only; not integrable into TARGET_SYSTEM. URL:https://www.bairesdev.com/tools/ai-colors', 'AI配色,调色板生成,UI设计,颜色方案', 'workflow', 2, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810012, '[资源存档] L008 uiverse-io galaxy', 'CATEGORY:UI_COMPONENT | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:10100 | LANG:CSS | CORE:Archive of 3000+ unique UI elements in pure HTML/CSS/JS — buttons, cards, loaders, inputs, toggles. CAPABILITIES:[3000+_unique_elements,pure_HTML_CSS_JS_no_framework_dependency,MIT_commercial_use,auto_sync_Uiverse.io,continuous_community_contributions] USAGE:[DOCS_REF_copy_code] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Pure CSS/JS elements adaptable into shadcn/ui components for TARGET_SYSTEM; animations and micro-interactions directly usable; MIT unrestricted use. URL:https://github.com/uiverse-io/galaxy', 'UI组件,CSS动画,按钮,卡片,加载动画,纯CSS,无框架依赖', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810013, '[资源存档] L009 Galaxy galaxyproject', 'CATEGORY:LEARNING_RESOURCE | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:1800 | LANG:Python | CORE:Open web-based scientific computing platform for bioinformatics and genomics. INTEGRATION_NOTES:IRRELEVANT to TARGET_SYSTEM — bioinformatics domain only; zero integration potential. URL:https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy', '生物信息学,基因组学,科学计算,无关项目', 'workflow', 1, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810014, '[资源存档] L010 SkillsMP', 'CATEGORY:SKILLS_SYSTEM | TYPE:MARKETPLACE | LICENSE:UNSPECIFIED | CORE:Agent Skills discovery marketplace aggregating 630k+ open-source Agent Skills from GitHub conforming to SKILL.md standard, supporting Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, ChatGPT. CAPABILITIES:[630000+_skills_aggregated,AI_semantic_search,category_browsing_finance,one_click_install_Claude_Code,SKILL.md_standard,quality_filter_2stars_min,periodic_GitHub_sync] USAGE:[WEB_APP,MARKETPLACE] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Directly supports SKILL.md standard used by TARGET_SYSTEM (Manus); finance category contains skills directly applicable to investment analysis workflows; use to discover pre-built skills before implementing from scratch. URL:https://skillsmp.com/zh', 'Agent Skills,技能市场,SKILL.md,Claude Code,金融技能,Manus兼容', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810015, '[资源存档] L011 Prompt Optimizer', 'CATEGORY:PROMPT_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:AI prompt optimization tool with one-click optimization, multi-round iteration, dual-mode (system/user prompts), analysis evaluation, comparison. CAPABILITIES:[one_click_optimization,dual_mode_system_user,multi_model_OpenAI_Gemini_DeepSeek,image_generation_T2I_I2I,advanced_test_mode_function_calling,MCP_protocol_Claude_Desktop,pure_client_side_privacy,Web_Desktop_Chrome_Docker] USAGE:[WEB_APP,CLI,DOCKER] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPL-3.0 limits commercial embedding; use as standalone tool for improving analysis engine prompts; MCP integration allows Claude Desktop to call it. URL:https://github.com/linshenkx/prompt-optimizer', 'Prompt优化,提示词迭代,MCP协议,Claude Desktop,纯客户端,隐私保护', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810016, '[资源存档] L012 Awesome LLM Apps', 'CATEGORY:LLM_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:Apache-2.0 | STARS:103500 | LANG:Python | CORE:Curated collection of LLM applications focused on RAG, AI Agent, multi-agent teams, MCP, voice agents using commercial and open-source models. CAPABILITIES:[entry_advanced_AI_agents,FINANCIAL_COACH_example,multi_agent_teams,voice_agents,MCP_agents,RAG_tutorials,memory_LLM_apps,LLM_fine_tuning,framework_crash_courses] USAGE:[DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AI Financial Coach example directly relevant to TARGET_SYSTEM; multi-agent patterns for 5-agent parallel analysis upgrade; RAG patterns for document analysis; Apache-2.0 commercial use allowed. URL:https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps', 'LLM应用,AI金融教练,多智能体,RAG,语音代理,MCP,Apache许可', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW());
